name: shopify-draft-proxy-rust-shim
description: TS shim re-exporting the Rust-port public API. Mirrors the surface area of the top-level shopify-draft-proxy package while the full runtime is being cut over to Rust.

scripts.dev: cd .. && gleam build --target javascript && cd js && tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.build: cd .. && corepack pnpm exec tsc -p js
scripts.test: cd .. && corepack pnpm exec vitest run js
